difficulty_levels.expert: 31-40: Complex workflows, conditional logic, multi-screen flows

tests.instruction: Click the search tab in the bottom navigation bar
tests.expected_result: Search screen is displayed with search bar and explore grid

tests.instruction: Click the Reels tab in the bottom navigation bar
tests.expected_result: Reels screen is displayed with full-screen video

tests.instruction: Click the Messages tab in the bottom navigation bar
tests.expected_result: Messages screen is displayed with conversation list

tests.instruction: Click the Profile tab in the bottom navigation bar
tests.expected_result: Profile screen is displayed with user info and posts grid

tests.instruction: Like the first post in the home feed
tests.expected_result: Heart icon turns red, like count increases by 1

tests.instruction: Save the first post in the home feed
tests.expected_result: Bookmark icon becomes filled, snackbar shows 'Saved'

tests.instruction: Click the notification icon (heart) on the home screen top bar
tests.expected_result: Notifications screen is displayed

tests.instruction: Click on the home tab to return to the home feed
tests.expected_result: Home screen with stories bar and post feed is displayed

tests.instruction: Click the new post icon (plus icon) on the home screen top bar
tests.expected_result: New post gallery screen is displayed with image grid

tests.instruction: Swipe up on the Reels screen to view the next reel
tests.expected_result: Next reel video is displayed and plays automatically

tests.instruction: Navigate to the Profile tab and click 'Edit profile' button
tests.expected_result: Edit profile screen is displayed with editable fields

tests.instruction: Open the search tab and type 'john' in the search bar
tests.expected_result: Search results show users matching 'john'

tests.instruction: Click on the first conversation in the Messages screen
tests.expected_result: Chat detail screen is displayed with message history

tests.instruction: Click the comment icon on the first post and view comments
tests.expected_result: Comment bottom sheet is displayed with comment list

tests.instruction: Click the share icon on the first post in the home feed
tests.expected_result: Share bottom sheet is displayed with user avatars and share options

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile and click 'Share profile' button
tests.expected_result: Share profile screen is displayed with QR code card

tests.instruction: Click the three-dot menu on the first post and select 'Not interested'
tests.expected_result: Menu bottom sheet opens, then dismisses after selecting 'Not interested'

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile and click on the Followers count
tests.expected_result: Followers/Following screen is displayed with Followers tab selected

tests.instruction: Like a reel on the Reels screen
tests.expected_result: Heart icon turns red and like count increases

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile, click the settings icon (hamburger menu), then go to 'Saved'
tests.expected_result: Saved screen is displayed with All Posts collection

tests.instruction: Open the comment section on the first post, type 'Nice photo!' and post the comment
tests.expected_result: New comment 'Nice photo!' appears in the comment list

tests.instruction: Open a chat conversation and send the message 'Hello, how are you?'
tests.expected_result: Message 'Hello, how are you?' appears as a sent message in the chat

tests.instruction: Navigate to Settings > Account Privacy and toggle the Private account switch on
tests.expected_result: Private account toggle is turned on

tests.instruction: Navigate to Settings > Time Management and enable the daily time limit, then set it to 60 minutes
tests.expected_result: Daily time limit toggle is on and slider shows 60 minutes

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile, click Edit profile, and change the display name to 'Test User'
tests.expected_result: Name field shows 'Test User'

tests.instruction: Click 'Follow' on a user in the home feed, then navigate to the Profile tab and check the Following count increased
tests.expected_result: Following count on profile increases by 1

tests.instruction: Navigate to Settings > Blocked, click the '+' icon, search for a user and block them
tests.expected_result: User appears in the blocked users list

tests.instruction: Navigate to Settings > Close Friends, search for a user and add them to close friends
tests.expected_result: User's button changes from 'Add' to 'Remove' indicating they are now a close friend

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile > Followers, then remove the first follower from the list
tests.expected_result: First follower is removed, follower count decreases by 1

tests.instruction: Navigate to Settings > Saved, click the '+' icon and create a new collection named 'Favorites'
tests.expected_result: New collection 'Favorites' appears in the collections list

tests.instruction: Create a new post: select the second image from gallery, write caption 'Beautiful sunset #nature', add the location 'Central Park', then share the post
tests.expected_result: Post is published with the selected image, caption, and location. Snackbar shows 'Post shared!'

tests.instruction: Create a new post: select any image, write a caption, add a poll with question 'Which is better?' and options 'Option A' and 'Option B', then share the post
tests.expected_result: Post is published with poll data configured

tests.instruction: Create a new post: select any image, write a caption, add music by searching for a track, set the audience to 'Close Friends', then share the post
tests.expected_result: Post is published with music and audience set to Close Friends

tests.instruction: Like the first post, then unlike it, and verify the heart icon returns to its original state
tests.expected_result: Heart icon is unfilled (not red), like count returns to original value

tests.instruction: Save a post from the home feed, then navigate to Settings > Saved and verify the post appears in 'All Posts'
tests.expected_result: The saved post image is visible in the Saved > All Posts grid

tests.instruction: Follow a user from their profile page, then navigate to your own Profile > Following tab and verify they appear in the following list
tests.expected_result: The followed user appears in the Following list with a 'Following' button

tests.instruction: Create a new post with a caption, enable 'Hide like and view counts' and 'Turn off commenting' in More Options, toggle sharing to Facebook in 'Also share to', then publish the post
tests.expected_result: Post is published with hide likes, commenting off, and Facebook sharing enabled

tests.instruction: Navigate to Profile > Edit profile, change the Name to 'New Name', change the Bio to 'Hello World', change the Username to 'newuser', then close the edit screen and verify the profile shows the updated information
tests.expected_result: Profile screen shows updated name 'New Name', bio 'Hello World', and username 'newuser'

tests.instruction: Block a user from Settings > Blocked, then navigate to that user's profile from the home feed and verify their profile shows as private/restricted. Finally, unblock them from Settings > Blocked
tests.expected_result: User is blocked, their content is restricted, then user is successfully unblocked

tests.instruction: Complete the following sequence: 1) Like and save the first post, 2) Open comments and add a comment 'Great post!', 3) Navigate to the post author's profile by clicking their username, 4) Follow the author, 5) Go back to home and verify the Follow button changed to 'Following'
tests.expected_result: Post is liked and saved, comment is added, author is followed, and home feed shows 'Following' status
